scripts.build:css: sass --load-path=node_modules --silence-deprecation=import,global-builtin,color-functions,if-function src/styles/main.scss src/styles/bootstrap.css --no-source-map --style=compressed && cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff2 src/styles/fonts/ && cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff src/styles/fonts/
